payload: {"code":"{\"v\":2,\"language\":\"JS\",\"entry\":\"index.js\",\"imports\":{},\"files\":{\"index.js\":\"export const createScene = async function () {\\n    // === 1. 游戏状态机 ===\\n    const gameState = {\\n        phase: \\\"FLIPPING\\\", \\n        p1Score: 0,\\n        p2Score: 0,\\n        currentPlayer: null,\\n        activeCoin: null,    \\n        hitList: new Set(),  \\n        coinsFallen: [],     \\n        isStable: true\\n    };\\n\\n    const scene = new BABYLON.Scene(engine);\\n    const havokInstance = await HavokPhysics();\\n    const hk = new BABYLON.HavokPlugin(true, havokInstance);\\n    scene.enablePhysics(new BABYLON.Vector3(0, -9.81, 0), hk);\\n\\n    // 环境高光（金币闪烁的关键）\\n    const hdrTexture = BABYLON.CubeTexture.CreateFromPrefilteredData(\\\"https://assets.babylonjs.com/environments/environmentSpecular.env\\\", scene);\\n    scene.environmentTexture = hdrTexture;\\n    \\n    const camera = new BABYLON.ArcRotateCamera(\\\"camera\\\", -Math.PI / 2, Math.PI / 3, 15, BABYLON.Vector3.Zero(), scene);\\n    camera.attachControl(canvas, true);\\n    new BABYLON.HemisphericLight(\\\"light\\\", new BABYLON.Vector3(0, 1, 0), scene);\\n\\n    // === 2. UI 系统 ===\\n    const adt = BABYLON.GUI.AdvancedDynamicTexture.CreateFullscreenUI(\\\"UI\\\");\\n    const p1Text = new BABYLON.GUI.TextBlock();\\n    const p2Text = new BABYLON.GUI.TextBlock();\\n    const infoText = new BABYLON.GUI.TextBlock();\\n\\n    const setupUI = () => {\\n        const styleText = (t, alignV) => {\\n            t.color = \\\"black\\\"; t.fontSize = 28;\\n            t.textHorizontalAlignment = BABYLON.GUI.Control.HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_RIGHT;\\n            t.textVerticalAlignment = alignV;\\n            t.paddingRight = \\\"20px\\\"; t.paddingTop = \\\"20px\\\"; t.paddingBottom = \\\"20px\\\";\\n            adt.addControl(t);\\n        };\\n        styleText(p1Text, BABYLON.GUI.Control.VERTICAL_ALIGNMENT_BOTTOM);\\n        styleText(p2Text, BABYLON.GUI.Control.VERTICAL_ALIGNMENT_TOP);\\n        infoText.text = \\\"Tossing Coin...\\\"; infoText.color = \\\"gold\\\"; infoText.fontSize = 35;\\n        adt.addControl(infoText);\\n    };\\n    setupUI();\\n\\n    const updateUI = () => {\\n        p1Text.text = `P1: ${gameState.p1Score}`;\\n        p2Text.text = `P2: ${gameState.p2Score}`;\\n        p1Text.color = gameState.currentPlayer === \\\"P1\\\" ? \\\"#00FF00\\\" : \\\"black\\\";\\n        p2Text.color = gameState.currentPlayer === \\\"P2\\\" ? \\\"#00FF00\\\" : \\\"black\\\";\\n    };\\n\\n    // === 3. 材质与场景物体 ===\\n    const goldMat = new BABYLON.PBRMaterial(\\\"goldMat\\\", scene);\\n    goldMat.metallic = 1.0; goldMat.roughness = 0.1;\\n    goldMat.albedoColor = new BABYLON.Color3(1, 0.8, 0.2);\\n\\n    const tableMat = new BABYLON.StandardMaterial(\\\"tableMat\\\", scene);\\n    tableMat.diffuseColor = new BABYLON.Color3(0.05, 0.05, 0.05);\\n\\n    const table = BABYLON.MeshBuilder.CreateCylinder(\\\"table\\\", {diameter: 10, height: 0.5}, scene);\\n    table.material = tableMat;\\n    new BABYLON.PhysicsAggregate(table, BABYLON.PhysicsShapeType.CYLINDER, { mass: 0, friction: 1 }, scene);\\n\\n    const createPillar = (name, x, z) => {\\n        const p = BABYLON.MeshBuilder.CreateCylinder(name, {diameter: 0.4, height: 1.5}, scene);\\n        p.position.set(x, 0.75, z);\\n        new BABYLON.PhysicsAggregate(p, BABYLON.PhysicsShapeType.CYLINDER, { mass: 0 }, scene);\\n    };\\n    createPillar(\\\"p1\\\", 0, 1); createPillar(\\\"p2\\\", -2.5, 2); createPillar(\\\"p3\\\", 2.5, 2);\\n\\n    let allCoins = [];\\n    const createCoin = (name, x, z) => {\\n        const coin = BABYLON.MeshBuilder.CreateCylinder(name, {diameter: 0.6, height: 0.15}, scene);\\n        coin.position.set(x, 1, z);\\n        coin.material = goldMat;\\n        const agg = new BABYLON.PhysicsAggregate(coin, BABYLON.PhysicsShapeType.CYLINDER, { mass: 2.0, friction: 1, restitution: 0.6 }, scene);\\n        \\n        agg.body.setCollisionCallbackEnabled(true);\\n        agg.body.getCollisionObservable().add((collisionEvent) => {\\n            if (gameState.phase === \\\"ANIMATING\\\" && gameState.activeCoin) {\\n                const otherBody = collisionEvent.collidedAgainst.transformNode;\\n                // 确保撞到的是硬币且不是自己\\n                if (otherBody && otherBody.name.includes(\\\"coin\\\") && otherBody !== gameState.activeCoin.mesh) {\\n                    gameState.hitList.add(otherBody.name);\\n                }\\n            }\\n        });\\n\\n        const obj = { name, mesh: coin, aggregate: agg };\\n        allCoins.push(obj);\\n        return obj;\\n    };\\n\\n    const removeCoin = (coinObj) => {\\n        if (!coinObj || !coinObj.mesh) return;\\n        coinObj.aggregate.dispose();\\n        coinObj.mesh.dispose();\\n        allCoins = allCoins.filter(c => c !== coinObj);\\n    };\\n\\n    // 初始化 6 枚硬币\\n    for(let i=0; i<6; i++) createCoin(\\\"coin_\\\"+i, Math.random()*6-3, Math.random()*6-2);\\n\\n    // === 4. 核心逻辑：结算系统 ===\\n    const processTurnResult = () => {\\n        const hitCount = gameState.hitList.size;\\n        const fallenCount = gameState.coinsFallen.length;\\n        let changeTurn = true;\\n\\n        // 1. 掉落判定（最高优先级）\\n        if (fallenCount > 0) {\\n            if (gameState.currentPlayer === \\\"P1\\\") gameState.p2Score += fallenCount;\\n            else gameState.p1Score += fallenCount;\\n            infoText.text = `FALLEN! ${fallenCount} TO OPPONENT`;\\n            changeTurn = true; \\n        } \\n        // 2. 精准打击（恰好碰到 1 个且都在台上）\\n        else if (hitCount === 1) {\\n            if (gameState.currentPlayer === \\\"P1\\\") gameState.p1Score++;\\n            else gameState.p2Score++;\\n            infoText.text = \\\"PERFECT! SCORE +1\\\";\\n            removeCoin(gameState.activeCoin); // 销毁并得分\\n            changeTurn = false; // 连连看：不换回合\\n        } \\n        // 3. 贪心判定（撞了 2 个或以上）\\n        else if (hitCount > 1) {\\n            if (gameState.currentPlayer === \\\"P1\\\") gameState.p2Score++;\\n            else gameState.p1Score++;\\n            infoText.text = \\\"TOO MANY HITS! SCORE TO OPPONENT\\\";\\n            removeCoin(gameState.activeCoin); // 销毁且分归对手\\n            changeTurn = true;\\n        } \\n        // 4. 落空判定\\n        else {\\n            infoText.text = \\\"MISSED EVERYTHING\\\";\\n            changeTurn = true; // 保留硬币，但换人\\n        }\\n\\n        infoText.alpha = 1;\\n        setTimeout(() => {\\n            infoText.alpha = 0;\\n            if (changeTurn) gameState.currentPlayer = (gameState.currentPlayer === \\\"P1\\\") ? \\\"P2\\\" : \\\"P1\\\";\\n            gameState.phase = (gameState.currentPlayer === \\\"P1\\\") ? \\\"P1_TURN\\\" : \\\"P2_TURN\\\";\\n            gameState.hitList.clear();\\n            gameState.coinsFallen = [];\\n            gameState.activeCoin = null;\\n            updateUI();\\n        }, 1500);\\n    };\\n\\n    // === 5. 交互逻辑（反向拉线箭头） ===\\n    const hl = new BABYLON.HighlightLayer(\\\"hl\\\", scene);\\n    let isDragging = false;\\n    let dragLine = null;\\n    let arrowLine = null;\\n\\n    const drawArrow = (start, end, scene, existing) => {\\n        const dir = end.subtract(start);\\n        if (dir.length() < 0.2) return existing;\\n        const pts = [start, end];\\n        const side = BABYLON.Vector3.Cross(dir.normalizeToNew(), BABYLON.Vector3.Up()).scale(0.2);\\n        pts.push(end.subtract(dir.scale(0.2)).add(side));\\n        pts.push(end);\\n        pts.push(end.subtract(dir.scale(0.2)).subtract(side));\\n        \\n        if (existing) return BABYLON.MeshBuilder.CreateLines(null, {points: pts, instance: existing});\\n        const l = BABYLON.MeshBuilder.CreateLines(\\\"arrow\\\", {points: pts, updatable: true}, scene);\\n        l.color = new BABYLON.Color3(0, 0.5, 1);\\n        return l;\\n    };\\n\\n    scene.onPointerObservable.add((pointerInfo) => {\\n        if (!gameState.phase.includes(\\\"TURN\\\")) return;\\n\\n        if (pointerInfo.type === BABYLON.PointerEventTypes.POINTERDOWN) {\\n            const hit = allCoins.find(c => c.mesh === pointerInfo.pickInfo.pickedMesh);\\n            if (hit) {\\n                gameState.activeCoin = hit;\\n                hl.addMesh(hit.mesh, BABYLON.Color3.White());\\n                isDragging = true;\\n                camera.detachControl();\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        if (pointerInfo.type === BABYLON.PointerEventTypes.POINTERMOVE && isDragging) {\\n            const pick = scene.pick(scene.pointerX, scene.pointerY, m => m === table);\\n            if (pick.hit) {\\n                const start = gameState.activeCoin.mesh.position;\\n                const pullDir = start.subtract(pick.pickedPoint);\\n                const arrowEnd = start.add(pullDir); \\n                \\n                if (dragLine) dragLine.dispose();\\n                dragLine = BABYLON.MeshBuilder.CreateLines(\\\"l\\\", {points: [start, pick.pickedPoint]}, scene);\\n                arrowLine = drawArrow(start, arrowEnd, scene, arrowLine);\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        if (pointerInfo.type === BABYLON.PointerEventTypes.POINTERUP && isDragging) {\\n            const pick = scene.pick(scene.pointerX, scene.pointerY, m => m === table);\\n            if (pick.hit) {\\n                const force = gameState.activeCoin.mesh.position.subtract(pick.pickedPoint).scale(45);\\n                gameState.activeCoin.aggregate.body.applyImpulse(force, gameState.activeCoin.mesh.position);\\n                gameState.phase = \\\"ANIMATING\\\";\\n            }\\n            if (dragLine) dragLine.dispose(); dragLine = null;\\n            if (arrowLine) arrowLine.dispose(); arrowLine = null;\\n            isDragging = false;\\n            hl.removeAllMeshes();\\n            camera.attachControl(canvas, true);\\n        }\\n    });\\n\\n    // === 6. 物理检测与掉落销毁 ===\\n    scene.onAfterRenderObservable.add(() => {\\n        if (gameState.phase === \\\"ANIMATING\\\") {\\n            const moving = allCoins.some(c => c.aggregate.body.getLinearVelocity().length() > 0.05);\\n            if (!moving && !gameState.isStable) {\\n                processTurnResult();\\n                gameState.isStable = true;\\n            } else if (moving) {\\n                gameState.isStable = false;\\n            }\\n        }\\n    });\\n\\n    scene.onBeforeRenderObservable.add(() => {\\n        for (let i = allCoins.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\\n            const c = allCoins[i];\\n            if (c.mesh.position.y < -3) {\\n                if (!gameState.coinsFallen.includes(c.name)) {\\n                    gameState.coinsFallen.push(c.name);\\n                }\\n                removeCoin(c);\\n                // 自动补货逻辑\\n                if (allCoins.length < 3) {\\n                    setTimeout(() => createCoin(\\\"coin_\\\" + Date.now(), Math.random()*4-2, Math.random()*4-2), 1000);\\n                }\\n            }\\n        }\\n    });\\n\\n    // 随机开局\\n    const tossCoin = () => {\\n        const isPeter = Math.random() > 0.5;\\n        gameState.currentPlayer = isPeter ? \\\"P1\\\" : \\\"P2\\\";\\n        infoText.text = isPeter ? \\\"PETER (P1) HEADS - START!\\\" : \\\"BRIAN (P2) TAILS - START!\\\";\\n        setTimeout(() => { infoText.alpha = 0; gameState.phase = isPeter ? \\\"P1_TURN\\\" : \\\"P2_TURN\\\"; updateUI(); }, 2000);\\n    };\\n    tossCoin();\\n\\n    return scene;\\n};\"}}","unicode":"","engine":"WebGL2","version":2}
name: CoinPlay
